note: Initial Foundation Lock v1 (merged PR #72). Immutable baseline; tag remains at this commit.

repinned_paths.reason: Real proof mode now requires model_prob_over_final and rejects the legacy model_prob_over column / PMF reconstruction. No change to Brier/log-loss/AUC formulas, challenger-minus-market sign, chronological selection/proof logic, date-cluster bootstrap, seed, CI, Holm correction, or minimum sample/date gates.
Reads model_prob_over_final for the selected Over probability (Under = 1 - final). No change to quote joins, date clustering, minimum-date requirements, CLV sign convention, or CLV thresholds.

Scores model_prob_over_final instead of the legacy alias. No change to outcome labeling, push exclusion, metric formulas, signed-CLV construction (close_side - open_side), or many-to-many fail-closed join guard.

probability_input_change: Model/evaluator probability input changed from the legacy model_prob_over to the delivered model_prob_over_final (single source of truth).
semantics_unchanged: Metric formulas, bootstrap clustering/seed, Holm correction, minimum sample/date gates, selection/proof date logic, quote selection, book averaging, settlement logic, CLV sign convention, CLV thresholds, recommendation thresholds, and market-comparison/betting-recommendation permissions are UNCHANGED.
tag_note: The immutable foundation-lock-v1 tag remains at d8c9681; the owner will create foundation-lock-v1.1 after PR #73 merges.
